title: Fdsundy's Black Criticals
description: This texture pack adds black crits to Minecraft. they can also be easily customisable for your own branded/favourite colours, using a pixel art editor. I just made this pack because it looks and feels nice.
body: This texture pack adds black crits to Minecraft. they can also be easily customisable for your own branded/favourite colours, using a pixel art editor. I just made this pack because it looks and feels nice.
